pi_items.source: Task description specifies 'depth is shown in feet' and Subsurface source code units.h defines enum LENGTH { METERS, FEET }
Task description specifies 'pressure is shown in psi' and Subsurface enum PRESSURE { BAR, PSI, PASCALS }
Task description specifies 'temperature is shown in Fahrenheit' and Subsurface enum TEMPERATURE { CELSIUS, FAHRENHEIT, KELVIN }
Task description specifies 'weight is shown in lbs' and Subsurface enum WEIGHT { KG, LBS }

privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring the Subsurface dive log to use the Imperial unit system. This correctly sets the length/depth unit to feet, pressure to psi, temperature to Fahrenheit, and weight to lbs. The metadata incorrectly claims the expected length unit is 'imperial', which is the name of the unit system, rather than the actual length unit 'feet'. The dive dataset (SampleDivesV2.ssrf) consists of real data collected from actual dive computers, obtained from the official Subsurface GitHub repository.
